flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado Technical University-Colorado Springs fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (16.1% → 12.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Colorado Technical University-Colorado Springs fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (22.6% → 18.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Colorado Technical University-Colorado Springs vs the 2018–2022 baseline (17.6% vs 24.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado Technical University-Colorado Springs fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
